description: Execute an allowlisted raw POST helper. This always requires `confirm_write=true` to perform the mutation.

body.title: Body

confirm_write.description: Explicit confirmation flag required for mutating write operations.
confirm_write.title: Confirm Write

operation.description: Name of an allowlisted raw operation defined by this MCP server.
operation.title: Operation
